title: Image tape
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:ImageTape.jpg|thumb|250px]]

'''Image tapes''' were a type of storage media used to store a series of moving images.

The extinct [[Jerni]] civilization were believed to have used image tapes. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] recovered image tapes from a derelict spacecraft which, when decoded by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] technicians, contained information on an artifact called the [[Eternity Crystal]] which could be used to [[Time travel/Legends|control the flow of time]]. However, these tapes were later [[Mission to Jerne|revealed]] to be an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forgery.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Dark Knight's Devilry|book=The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 153|reprint=1}} {{Flash}}
